characters.name: Alan Lowenstein
characters.description: Alan Lowensteinis an recurring character in seriesYoung & Hungry. He's portrayed byBryan Safi. Alan is a forty-year old man who used to go to school withElliot Park. Ever since college, Alan had a crush on Elliot but he never told him, he thinks Elliot is such a catch and everyone wanted to be with him in high school. Alan was a shy guy and still is presumably he wasn't so popular in school. He never stopped thinking of Elliot. When Gabi contacted him he was happy and quickly agreed to see Elliot again. He opened a karaoke bar calledMe Sing? I could never. Okay! Alan is in his forties. He has brown eyes and brown hair. He's slim body texture and is medium height.

characters.name: Amir
characters.description: Amiris a minor character in seriesYoung & Hungry. Amir is Josh's friend. Amir first gets only mentioned by Josh. He was invited to his party. Later he was seen at the party hanging with Josh and his friends and playing videogames at the couch sitting next to Elliot.

characters.name: Andre
characters.description: Andreis a character inseason 2ofYoung & Hungry. He were be portrayed byMiguel Pinzon. He's Josh's florist at his disaster wedding with Caroline. He will also take an interest in Elliot. TBA

characters.name: Beverly
characters.description: Beverlyis a guest character in seriesYoung & Hungry. Beverly is Cam's mom and she does not have a husband or boyfriend. She is raising a child on her own and she hopes he'll get into Berkeley. Young & Younger

characters.name: Beverly
characters.description: Beverlyis a guest character in seriesYoung & Hungry. Beverly is Cam's mom and she does not have a husband or boyfriend. She is raising a child on her own and she hopes he'll get into Berkeley. Young & Younger

characters.name: Cam
characters.description: Camis a guest character in seriesYoung & Hungry. He was a love interest for Gabi. Cam is a seventeen year old teen who is just about to graduate high school. He is just having some problems so he needs a tutor. He wants to get in a great college. He is very handsome and he datedGabi Diamond. His mother isBeverly. Cam is a very handsome seventeen year old teenager. He is very tall and has beautiful blue eyes and brown hair. He is also very slim and he has an athlete body shape. He looks very old for his age.

characters.name: Caroline Huntington
characters.description: Caroline Penelope Huntingtonis one of the recurring characters inYoung & Hungry. She is portrayed byMallory Jensen. Caroline is a young beautiful woman who is rich and is very sophisticated. She wears expensive clothes and she was Josh's fiance. In season 1 episode 1, she wanted a break from Josh and she slept with another guy for 14 hours. Caroline is very self absorbed, and she mainly paid more attention to things regarding herself instead of her fiance.

characters.name: Caroline Huntington

characters.name: Cheryl
characters.description: Cherylis a guest character in seriesYoung & Hungry. She's portrayed bySasha Compère. Cheryl rang the door at Josh's apartment. Yolanda opened her the door and she walked in, Cheryl told Yoland that she does not know why she called her but that she's not gonna complain about it. So Yolanda told her to put some lipstick on and she did. When Derek came in Cheryl greeted him, they hugged and the two got back together. Cheryl is a beautiful not tall lawyer. She has a dark skin and long brown hair. Her eyes are also brown. She wears beautiful clothes.

characters.name: Coleman
characters.description: Coleman Jamesis a character that appears in season 2 ofYoung & Hungry.[1]He is Yolanda's ex-husband. Coleman is around forty year old man. He is a plastic surgeon and a doctor. Coleman is quite a ladies man. He has an ex wifeYolandawho he keeps having romances with. Yolanda and Coleman were married but then they got a divorce because Coleman was cheating on Yolanda. He was about to get married for the second time but his bride stood him up right at the altar. After that he was sensitive so Yolanda wanted to get close to him and get a revenge but they once again had sex. When they went on a dinner Coleman left a waitress his phone number, so obviously he's no trust and is a player. He has a son namesDerek. Coleman is a medium aged man. He had brown eyes and brown hair. He has a dark skin. Coleman is medium height and a bit chubby body shape. He's quite a player and likes to have affairs with lots of women.

characters.name: Cooper Finley
characters.description: Cooper Finleywas a minor character in the series,Young & Hungry. He is portrayed byJesse McCartney. He was only seen in the first two seasons. Cooper Finley is a twenty three year old young adult. He is a computer genius and hacker. He hacked Josh's app and forced it offline. He lives in a small apartment and is not very rich. He likes Gabi.  He dated Gabi but the job meant to much and he didn't want to lose it so he broke up with her. After that he moved to China but he couldn't stop thinking about Gabi so he came back from China to see her. Young & Punchy

characters.name: Danielle
characters.description: Danielle Stevensis one of the minor characters in the series,Young & Hungry. She is portrayed byAbbie Cobb. Danielle is a twenty-five-year-old woman who's the child ofShauna. She hasn't spoken with her mother in lots of years because they had a big fight. When she was seven years old, she had a birthday party and a bouncy house but she didn't know that her mother had sex in there with a clown. She admitted that she missed her mother and her life hasn't been the same without her.

characters.name: Derek
characters.description: Derek Jamesis a guest character in seriesYoung & Hungry. > Derek is a twenty four year old lawyer. He finished law school and now he's looking for a job. He had a girlfriend Cheryl who was the love of his life but they broke up because Yolanda didn't approve of Cheryl. He was very sad but then Sofia and Gabi helped him and he got back together with Cheryl. He once loved tandem riding bike with his mom. To be added

characters.name: Dick Jacoby
characters.description: Harry Dick Jacoby[1]is a character inseason 5ofYoung & HungryasSofia's new love interest and is portrayed byTim Rock. He first appeared inYoung & Third Wheel. Dick is a dentist and is Sofia's new love interest, who she is set up with for a blind date inYoung & Third Wheel, but they break up at the end of the episode after he returns to his ex-girlfriend Kayla, after she proposes to Dick in front of Sofia. Its also revealed that Dick is his middle name and Harry is his first name. Dick has brown eyes and short brown hair.

characters.name: Dick Jacoby
characters.description: Harry Dick Jacoby[1]is a character inseason 5ofYoung & HungryasSofia's new love interest and is portrayed byTim Rock. He first appeared inYoung & Third Wheel. characters.name: Elliot Park
characters.description: Jung-yi “Elliot” Parkis one of the main characters in the series,Young & Hungry. He plays Josh's right hand man and helps him and stands by his side. He is portrayed byRex Lee. High-strung Elliot is Josh’s publicist and right-hand-man. He oversees the hiring of Josh’s personal chef. Elliot would much prefer a famous chef for the job and is unimpressed by Gabi and her resume. He makes no secret of his disdain for Gabi. Elliot is an openly gay and doesn't hides it. He has a crush on his boss Josh Kaminski, but Josh doesn't feel the same way because Josh is straight. He can sometimes be offensive, but he can also get emotional. He is openly gay and stopped pretending to like girls in high school. He kind of likes Josh and he's not afraid to tell him. Elliot is very negative when he talks withGabiand tries to get her fired after she got the job because he wantedChef Michaelto get the job, but is very polite when he talks toJosh. He sometimes is not that strong person just like on a diet. He can easily eat something he was not supposed to.

characters.name: Gabi Diamond
characters.description: Gabriella "Gabi" Diamondis the main protagonist in the series,Young & Hungry.She is portrayed byEmily Osment. She is a feisty young food blogger. Delightfully outrageous, good-hearted and charismatic, Gabi is a self-taught, ambitious young chef with a true gift, not only for cooking, but for figuring out what it is people really want to eat. She’s funny and feisty and willing to work hard to make her dream of becoming a professional chef a reality, and she’s thrilled when she gets the chance to be the personal chef for San Francisco millionaireJosh Kaminski. Gabi learned how to cook when she was a child. She loves Julia Child with her who is also her inspiration. She used to live with her parents but now she lives with her best friendSofia Rodriguezin a small apartment in San Francisco. Even though she struggles to pay rent, she still lives a comfortable young adult life. Gabi's dreams to be a chef came true when she started working for a tech millionaire,Josh Kaminski.The night Gabi was supposed to have a trial dinner, she ends up sleeping with her boss. Throughout the series she had a part romance and platonic relationship with him. Gabi is blunt and klutzy, and she has a great sense of style. She's compassionate, caring, empathetic, kind, intelligent, beautiful, friendly but she can also be pushy and judgmental. She is sometimes dim-witted. She is a very nice and friendly girl, who is very passionate about cooking. She has an ability to know what people want to eat, but she can also sometimes find herself in awkward positions. Gabi is a really open person and she can stand up for herself. When she meets Michael Voltaggio (the winner of Top Chef), she is anything but shy. She starts to talk to him like they are friends, showing she is very comfortable with people. However, in episode 2,Young & Ringless, she shows she can be insecure and lack confidence when she is going in to her first day of work. Gabi establishes that she can be quick to act and doesn't always think things through, which can lead to funny but sometimes serious consequences, but she does own up to her mistakes. She is shown to care very deeply for her friends in her life, especially her best friend Sofia, and her newest friend (and crush)Josh.

characters.name: Jake Kaminski
characters.description: Jacob “Jake” Kaminskiis one of the recurring characters in the series,Young & Hungry.He isJosh Kaminski's brother and portrayed byJayson Blair.

characters.name: Jake Kaminski
characters.description: Jacob “Jake” Kaminskiis one of the recurring characters in the series,Young & Hungry.He isJosh Kaminski's brother and portrayed byJayson Blair.

characters.name: Jessica Rounds
characters.description: Dr.Jessica Roundsis a recurring character inYoung & Hungry. She is portrayed byBriana Lane. Jessica Rounds is a young, tall, and beautiful woman who has flawless skin, big brown eyes, and long brown hair. She usually wears glasses and professional clothes but has been seen in red and green dresses. She is first introduced inYoung & Therapy, whereGabi DiamondforcesJosh Kaminskito go to her for help in solving commitment issues for their relationship. She helps him see that is connected with unresolved matters from his past. She is first introduced inYoung & Therapy, whereGabi DiamondforcesJosh Kaminskito go to her for help in solving commitment issues for their relationship. She helps him see that is connected with unresolved matters from his past. DuringYoung & Lottery, Josh is mentioned to still be seeing her and soon has a sex dream about her, which is said to be a transference of his issues, and he is advised to tell her. When meeting Dr. Rounds for his session, Josh awkwardly tries to explain his dream about her, but Jessica receives news that because of the thunderstorm that her dog Sigmund was hit by a car and is at the animal hospital. Josh gives her a ride and stays with her, as she awaits the news of her dog and she tries to take her mind off it by talking about his dream, but she cuts him off because of her distraction. Later, she continued to wait with Josh by her side. Soon she is informed that Sigmund is out of surgery and is okay. She is overjoyed and hugs Josh, grateful for his support in this situation. However, in the hug, she is overcome by emotion and passionately kisses Josh. The pair were left embracing and staring awkwardly at each other after the kiss. InYoung & No More Therapy, she is surprised by Josh coming for his session, but he says he needs her encouragement. Jessica decides to address the kiss and calls it a mistake, deciding to be professional by going with the session and congratulating Josh on his recent award but soon gets jealous when he brings up Gabi again and tries to hide it but fails when he questioned her. Jessica then apologizes before getting emotional and admits that she can't stop thinking about their kiss and has developed feelings for him. He is taken aback and can barely get a word in, as she tells him that he needs a new therapist while she was shifting between wanting him to stay or keeping him before forcing him out. At the end, she shows up on the plane that Josh was taking to Australia. It is revealed that she bought an extra ticket to go with him, briefly worried if she overstepped and tried to leave. However, Josh quickly stopped and assured her it was fine because Gabi officially broke ties with him after learning of the kiss. Jessica feels sorry and sits with him to talk about it. They are later seen at the bar chatting over drinks, unaware Gabi was watching them. DuringYoung & Hawaii, Josh and Jessica continue to talk, and he reveals that he is actually happy that she was with him to take

characters.name: Jilly
characters.description: Jillyis a minor character inYoung & Hungry, who briefly dated Josh. She is portrayed byTessa Harnetiaux. Jilly is a young, tall, and beautiful woman who has flawless skin, big brown eyes, and long brown hair. She is first introduced inYoung & Cookin', where she shows up wearing a towel in Josh's bedroom and wished Josh happy two-week anniversary and Josh tells a curious Sofia he'll meet her at the airport later. However, he postpones it to enjoy sexy time with his girlfriend. When meetingGabi Diamond, Josh tells her about his new girlfriend Jilly. The next morning, Gabi comes to Josh's and greets everyone. However, tension immediately starts when she meets his new girlfriend Jilly who has made breakfast for everyone. Gabi seems to get jealous that everyone loves her food and thanks her for keeping everyone well fed but then she takes off her apron and tells her she can take it from here. Josh immediately senses the rift and starts to worry, due to his unresolved feelings for Gabi. That night, Josh can't sleep and Jilly says she knows something is bugging him and tells him that she's insecure because she believes that he hasn't forgotten his ex-fiancéeCaroline Huntington, that he broke up with three weeks ago though was unaware it was Gabi not Caroline that Josh hasn't forgotten about. Josh quickly goes along with it and reassures Jilly that he has moved onto her, sharing a kiss to prove it. Suddenly, Josh and Jilly hear a noise from the kitchen thinking it's a burglar but when Josh goes downstairs, he sees Gabi who is already cooking so she could be before Jilly. When Jilly then comes down and Josh goes up Jilly and Gabi have a deal that they will have a cook off and if Gabi wins Jilly stays out of kitchen and if Jilly wins she can cook whenever she wants. A cookoff begins and Josh tries the dished blindfolded and he chose Jilly's. In the evening the businessmen leave, Josh tells Jilly the dinner was great and sees good things happening especially with her cooking. To celebrate, they dance to a song but suddenly Josh's message to Gabi starts to play. Josh tries to cover it up but Jilly realizes he's still not over his ex and its not Caroline but Gabi. He is forced to tell her of their history and that he likes Jilly but couldn't answer if he had lingering feelings for Gabi. Jilly calmly accepted this and assured Josh that he was a good man but she won't be second place, so they break up. characters.name: Josh Kaminski
characters.description:
Joshua Xander "Josh" Kaminskiis one of the main characters inYoung & Hungry. 
He is portrayed byJonathan Sadowski. He is a dot com whiz and a self-made millionaire. He’s cute and charming but his smarts and sweetness have often gotten in his way when it comes to love, especially with his ex-fiancé Caroline. He’s blown away by Gabi’s cooking, and hires her to be his personal chef. However, Josh and Gabi get a little closer than they anticipated on Gabi’s first day on the job. Josh is a friendly boss who happens to get along very well with his employees (especially Gabi.). His favorite food is mashed potatoes with a lot of butter and cream. Josh is a young, tall, and slim man with a lot of money. He has a heart shaped face with a smooth, flawless skin and big, beautiful, blue eyes. He has a small nose, smooth, fair skin and short brown hair that both he and Gabi refer to as "great." He usually wears cool, casual clothes, long pants, a shirt covered with a jacket. Josh is a young tech millionaire that bought a penthouse and a housekeeper, publicist, and a personal chef, but he still seems like a nice and comfortable person. He is not like millionaire cliche's that portray them to be strict and stuck-up, but he's friendly and has a helpful personality. He does not always trust himself, so he often enlists his right man,Elliot Park, to assist with making decision and help him in awkward positions. Josh is a very sensitive man and gets sad very quickly, when his girlfriend broke up with him and he broke down and lay on the couch, cuddling a pillow in depression. Josh is the kind of person who will forgive a mistake very quickly. When Caroline broke up with him and then came back, he forgive her (despite the fact that she admitted to sleeping with another man for 14 hours) and proposed to her. Josh is a very nice and comfortable man and thinks that all people are good, but if he gets mad he can become aggressive, such as he started to shout at Caroline when she wanted to see the footage from the start that Gabi walked into the house. He also has been shown to be somewhat arrogant, especially about his own skill sets and when he feels his gut feeling is right. He does not appreciate others putting down what he feels he is good at, such as when Cooper mocked his programming skills, he quickly became defensive. He has shown that he has a very strong, paternal instinct and goes out of his way to help people he cares about.

characters.name: Judy Green
characters.description: Judy Greenis the girlfriend ofLogan RawlingsShe is portrayed byJessica Lowndes. Near the end of Young & Lesbian,GabiandLogan kisscausing Judy to be jealous. At the end, they get back together. Judy is a famous chef that works in a restaurantPure.

characters.description: Kathy Kaminskiis one of the minor characters in the series,Young & Hungryand Josh and Jake's mother. She is portrayed byCheryl Hines. Fact: Josh said he saw his mother everyday.

characters.name: Lizette
characters.description: Lizetteis a guest character inYoung & Hungry. She was first mentioned in the season 2 episode,Young & Earthquakeand is first physically seen inYoung & Bridesmaids. She is a frenemy to both Gabi and Sofia and is portrayed by Nicole Buyer. Lizette has dark skin, brown eyes and black hair with with light brown highlights. Lizette is first mentioned inYoung & Earthquakeby Gabi and Sofia who she knew from school and they were frenemy's with her, but she is not seen.

characters.name: Logan Rawlings
characters.description: Judy Green(girlfriend) Logan Rawlingsis a guest character inYoung & Hungry. She's portrayed byAshley Tisdale. She is a magazine editor who "breathes style and cool" . She's originally on hand to interview Josh about his successful career, but she quickly becomes intrigued by Gabi's cooking skills instead. She is a lesbian and was attracted to Gabi. Her current girlfriend is Judy Green.

characters.name: Matt Danon
characters.description: Matt DanonisJosh's estranged father. He is a recurring character inseason 5ofYoung & Hungryand first seen in the episode,Young & Josh's Dad. Matt is estranged and has a very complicated relationship with his son, Josh. Josh barely knows his father and it is currently unknown where he lives, although its more likely in San Fransisco. Matt wants to patch things up with his son, Josh, who doesn't want to see him and the two don't get along well as they barely know each other. When Gabi and Sofia pick Matt up at the airport, Josh tricks Gabi in to believing he is with his dad, which causes Gabi to think she picked up a stranger. However, when they're getting gas, Gabi accidentally runs Matt over, landing him in the hospital. Josh visits his father, but tells him he will help him with the cost of the hospital, but will not let him have another dime, still thinking his dad is after his money.

characters.name: Mike
characters.description: Mike is a guest character in seriesYoung & Hungry. Mike is a mechanic that has it's own Mechanic studio where he also sells used cars. He likes to tricks his costumers for them to give him more money. Mike was at his mechanic studio fixing cars. Then Josh came and he wanted to buy Gabi a new car or try to get it fixed. Then Mike told him what's wrong with the car and how it's unsafe and that he wouldn't let his mother drive it.  Then he told Josh that for ive hundred dollars he can get him a new used car. Later Gabi and Josh came to his studio and Mike told them that he is not giving them her car back. But then he told them that for ten thousand dollars he would and then he raised it to twenty and then to thirty. Again hours later Yolanda and Elliot came into the studio and they wanted to buy a car for not much money. But Mike quickly knew that they are not a couple and that Gabi sended them. He told them that they need to kiss.

characters.name: Ms. Wilson
characters.description: Bernice Willsonis a character inseason 5ofYoung & Hungryand is Gabi and Sofia's downstairs neighbour. She is portrayed byBetty White. When Gabi tries to escape from Josh, she finds herself in Mrs. Willson's house, who threatens to call the cops on her, who is also wearing a wedding dress. Gabi apologises for breaking in and asks why Mrs Willson is wearing the dress. She explains she wears it every valentines day and it gives answers to life questions. Mrs Willson lets Gabi try on the dress to see if she's ready for marriage (Gabi thinks Josh is proposing) and explains she has been married 5 times. In the end, when Gabi returns with the dress, she says she's not ready for marriage and she and Mrs Willson get a show from a stripper meant for Sofia and Yolanda. Its revealedGabishares her birthday with Mrs Willson and convinces Mrs Willson to go to Las Vegas to visit Bernie, an ex-boyfriend. Its revealed that Mrs Willson's first name is Bernice and its implied or possible that Bernice and Bernie got back together.
